item.title: What do Costa Rican birds really eat? 🦜🌿 Scientists used s...
item.description:
View on Instagram


What do Costa Rican birds really eat? 🦜🌿 Scientists used stable isotopes to uncover how agriculture is reshaping their diets. The results might surprise you! Çağan H. Şekercioğlu, Melissa J. Fullwood, Thure Cerling, Federico Oviedo Brenes, Gretchen C. Daily, Paul R. Ehrlich, Page Chamberlain, Seth D. Newsome. Using stable isotopes to measure the dietary responses of Costa Rican forest birds to agricultural countryside. Frontiers in Ecology and Evolution, 2023; 11 DOI: 10.3389/fevo.2023.1086616#Science #Ecology #Birds

item.title: Diving for fossils in Florida is like digging through history—...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Diving for fossils in Florida is like digging through history—except the history bites back! 🦴🐴 Two hobby divers just uncovered a half-million-year-old graveyard of prehistoric horses, sloths, and giant armadillos. Who knew coffee-colored water could hide so many secrets? ☕️💀 Would you ever go fossil diving? https://www.floridamuseum.ufl.edu/science/underwater-fossil-bed-discovered-by-collectors-preserves-rare-slice-of-floridas-past/Richard C. Hulbert, Rachel E. Narducci, Robert W. Sinibaldi, Joseph R. Branin. An Equus-Dominated Middle Pleistocene (Irvingtonian) Vertebrate Fauna from Northcentral Florida, USA. Fossil Studies, 2024; 2 (4): 294 DOI: 10.3390/fossils2040014 #Prehistoric #Fossils

item.title: Raspberry notes in your coffee? 🍓☕️ Scientists just uncov...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Raspberry notes in your coffee? 🍓☕️ Scientists just uncovered the secret behind fermented coffee’s bold, fruity flavors—almost like juice! Would you try it?American Chemical Society. “Fermented coffee’s fruity aromas demystified.”#Coffee #Tongue

item.title: We’re taking nearly half of Earth’s plant life for ourselves...
item.description:
View on Instagram


We’re taking nearly half of Earth’s plant life for ourselves—how much will be left for nature? 🌎 Suman Paudel, Kaeli Mueller, Gustavo Ovando-Montejo, Richard Rushforth, Lauren Tango, Christopher Lant. Product-Specific human appropriation of net primary production in US counties. Ecological Indicators, 2023; 150: 110241 DOI: 10.1016/j.ecolind.2023.110241#Sustainability #HumanImpact

item.title: ☕ How can coffee shops and restaurants do good—and still mak...
item.description:
View on Instagram


☕ How can coffee shops and restaurants do good—and still make money?A study found that Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) is most effective when it aligns with a business’s core strengths. That’s why a coffee shop working with local farmers to grow sustainable beans creates both social and business value. 🌱💰Seoki Lee, Da Hyun S Hwang, Minjung Shin, Kyung Ho Kang. Strategic corporate social responsibility in the tourism and hospitality industry: Conceptual proposal. Tourism Economics, 2024; DOI: 10.1177/13548166241299140#Sustainability #Business

item.title: I just love when scientists come up with new materials 👀 imag...
item.description:
View on Instagram


I just love when scientists come up with new materials 👀 imagine the possibilities! I’m stoked at the idea of the running shoes but I’m curious what interests you guys Wenjie Zhou, Sujeeka Nadarajah, Liuchi Li, Anna Guell Izard, Hujie Yan, Aashutosh K. Prachet, Payal Patel, Xiaoxing Xia, Chiara Daraio. 3D polycatenated architected materials. Science, 2025; 387 (6731): 269 DOI: 10.1126/science.adr9713https://youtu.be/Z-P7lfW-p-8?si=BPO_MO4MvDgDsTI0#Engineering #Materials

item.title: Hey 👋 Come see me at Colombian Coffee Beans in Tigard this af...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Hey 👋 Come see me at Colombian Coffee Beans in Tigard this afternoon! I got new goals this year hbu Ariella S. Kristal, Julian J. Zlatev. Going beyond the “self” in self-control: Interpersonal consequences of commitment strategies.. Journal of Personality and Social Psychology, 2024; DOI: 10.1037/pspa0000385#Goals #Willpower

item.title: Sorry I haven’t posted in a while 🙈 mental health over ever...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Sorry I haven’t posted in a while 🙈 mental health over everything. I won’t be back at Colombian Coffee Beans until Tuesday, January 28th…in the afternoon of course! So come say hi then and we can brighten each others day 🥰Xuan Wang, Hao Ma, Qi Sun, Jun Li, Yoriko Heianza, Rob M Van Dam, Frank B Hu, Eric Rimm, JoAnn E Manson, Lu Qi. Coffee drinking timing and mortality in US adults. European Heart Journal, 2025; DOI: 10.1093/eurheartj/ehae871#Coffee #MorningRoutine

item.title: More coffee more physics ✨ come see me sometime @colombiancoff...
item.description:
View on Instagram


More coffee more physics ✨ come see me sometime @colombiancoffeebeanspdx !William Lee, Ann Smith, Arsalaan Arshad. Uneven Extraction in Coffee Brewing. Physics of Fluids, 2023; DOI: 10.1063/5.0138998#Coffee #Mathematics

item.title: It’s called fusarium xylarioides and it uses horizontal gene t...
item.description:
View on Instagram


It’s called fusarium xylarioides and it uses horizontal gene transfer to harness more power 💪🏼 Lily D. Peck, Theo Llewellyn, Bastien Bennetot, Samuel O’Donnell, Reuben W. Nowell, Matthew J. Ryan, Julie Flood, Ricardo C. Rodríguez de la Vega, Jeanne Ropars, Tatiana Giraud, Pietro D. Spanu, Timothy G. Barraclough. Horizontal transfers between fungal Fusarium species contributed to successive outbreaks of coffee wilt disease. PLOS Biology, 2024; 22 (12): e3002480 DOI: 10.1371/journal.pbio.3002480#Coffee #Fungus

item.title: Coffee crops vs fungi what do we do now Lily D. Peck, Theo Llewe...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Coffee crops vs fungi what do we do now Lily D. Peck, Theo Llewellyn, Bastien Bennetot, Samuel O’Donnell, Reuben W. Nowell, Matthew J. Ryan, Julie Flood, Ricardo C. Rodríguez de la Vega, Jeanne Ropars, Tatiana Giraud, Pietro D. Spanu, Timothy G. Barraclough. Horizontal transfers between fungal Fusarium species contributed to successive outbreaks of coffee wilt disease. PLOS Biology, 2024; 22 (12): e3002480 DOI: 10.1371/journal.pbio.3002480#Fungus #Coffee
